prompt: Tap the big blind seat before facing-open response.
why_v1: Big blind has different defend thresholds than other seats.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Anchoring the big blind first frames this spot from the forced defender's seat, which is why the facing-open response changes.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The big blind is the forced defender here, so anchor it first. That seat defends wider and must act first after the flop, which changes the facing-open response.
